calendar_tail.availability_model: historical resume resource weekly windows + holidays
calendar_tail.note: Only the contiguous deterministic off-shift interval immediately preceding resume is subtracted; this is a calibrated residual, not a causal customer-wait decomposition.

case_duration_envelope.basis: first-to-last observed event; lower bound for omitted parallel business waits
